text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
U-u-u-um, Doto? Do you have a moment? I'm
really sorry to bother you...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I want to talk to you about your recent condition
and... race-readiness...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That day, Agnes Digital summoned her courage
and spoke with Meisho Doto.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day has finally come when we get to learn of
the results of her intervention.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer! I can't! My oshi! I can't even look at
her!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's Doto's first graded race! I swear if my
meddling causes her to screw up, I'll just... I just
hope she's able to finish safely!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto's first attempt at a graded race is
the G2 Nikkei Shinshun Hai.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not much is expected from her though,
considering she's eighth on the list of favorites.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clang!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And here comes Meisho Doto! Meisho Doto
brings it in for a shocking second-place finish!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
What a knockout comeback after her slump at
the end of the year! What could have been the
catalyst?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh... She got second?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! She did it! My oshi did it! My unsolicited
advice didn't lead her astray!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital still believes that she crossed the
line. But then...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Digital! Digital! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Your talk on race-readiness helped me power
through my disaster period.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I kept telling myself everything would be okay,
and it's finally happened. I'm so grateful you
talked to me...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
D-Doto?! Wait. Hold on, please... My heart... I
can't take any more...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: It's aaall thanks to you, Digital. Sniffle... Thank you so, so much!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Bwaaaagh...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's like a whole new world has opened... My body
feels... full...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital experiences a moment of nirvana
thanks to Meisho Doto's heartfelt gratitude.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hyah! I'm so sorry. I got so overwhelmed hearing
you say that. Everything went blank!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So you don't hate me? Even though I lectured you
like I was some kind of know-it-all?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I really appreciate what you did. I need assistance and support in order to get better.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Really? You? How could that be true for a practically real-life angel?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
A real-life a-angel? Oh my goodness... I'm
nothing like that, honest!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I... can't do anything on my own. That's why I
need to learn and experience a lot of different
things... if I want to bridge the gap.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: So... I really didn't bother you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Also... when you said you want to "bridge the
gap," did you mean, like...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The gap between you and Opera O? Is it because
growing apart hurts too much???

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Especially when she's all you ever dreamed of?!? And you'd do anything to be by her side?!!?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: That's right. ♪ After all...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I respect Opera O so much. I want to be as
confident as her one day!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto speaks without hesitation, and a
light I've never seen before flashes in Agnes
Digital's eyes as she takes it in.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. Or should I say, my comrade in
simping? I've got a question for you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: What does it mean to be sublime?
choice_data_list: That's kind of a broad question...
That's kind of a broad question...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... You're right. But... I feel like I don't
understand it anymore.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I thought keeping my distance from the sacred
Umas was the de facto proper behavior. But now
I've gone and engaged with Doto directly, and
what happened?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
She smiled at me... She spoke to me about her
object of admiration... and her pure desire to
pursue it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I got a shining glimpse of something I'd never
seen before.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: What was that? It was different from the usual allure.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
There was no hint of the squealing or giggling I
expected... It was a totally unadulterated
brilliance...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
One so strong, it could purify the entire world...
What is that unknown radiance?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital mulls over this question for a
moment...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Gyaah! I've got no clue! Literally no clue! And all this thinking is giving me a headache!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I still don't fully understand the charm of
Umamusume... But from this day forward, I'm
gonna figure out how to figure it out...
choice_data_list: How about trying to find it through racing?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Racing, huh? Yeah... if I don't run alongside them
myself, I might never discover it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All right, then. I'll try to take another look at their
purity in the Hyacinth Stakes!
